title: Shaper
description: A support API for loading and exporting JSON voxel shapes for hitboxes
body:
# Shaper – Support Tool for Voxel Shape Exporting

**Shaper** is a support API for modders to **define, load, and export voxel shapes (hitboxes)** efficiently.  
You can either use the **Blockbench integration** (via the Shaper plugin) to export shapes directly, or write your own hitbox JSON files by hand. More details can be found in the wiki.  
Shaper supports **Fabric, Forge, and Quilt**.

## Key Features

| Feature                  | Description                                                                 |
|---------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Blockbench Integration** | Export hitboxes directly from Blockbench using the Shaper plugin.           |
| **Manual JSON Support**    | Write hitboxes manually in JSON format (see wiki for examples).             |
| **Voxel Shape Export**     | Uses flat JSON lists for easy editing and reuse.                            |                        |
| **Support Tool**           | Simplifies and speeds up hitbox creation for developers.                    |
| **Extensible & Modular**   | Fully compatible with Fabric, Forge, and Quilt modding pipelines.           |
